name: Failure Drill
short_description: A 2D, singleplayer adventure game set in the near future. The player controls Claire on her journey as a soldier in a mysterious war, while also attempting to solve the enigmas her identity and reality hinged upon before. This game is a drama with psychological horror themes and stylized 2D art.
detailed_description: In this 2D, story driven singleplayer adventure game set in the near future, the player controls a schoolgirl named Claire during her journey to find purpose and acceptance as a military cadet in a mysterious war, while also attempting to understand the often-overlooked enigmas her identity and reality hinged upon before enlisting. This game is a story-rich drama with psychological horror themes and stylized 2D art.
about_the_game: In this 2D, story driven singleplayer adventure game set in the near future, the player controls a schoolgirl named Claire during her journey to find purpose and acceptance as a military cadet in a mysterious war, while also attempting to understand the often-overlooked enigmas her identity and reality hinged upon before enlisting. This game is a story-rich drama with psychological horror themes and stylized 2D art.
